flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Alfred University rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.9k → $41.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Alfred University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.0k → $41.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alfred University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alfred University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (70.5% → 77.5%).
